name: Kahlua
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix water, sugar, and coffee crystals in a large mixing bowl.
2. Heat the mixture over medium heat until all ingredients are dissolved.
3. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature.
4. Add vodka to taste (typically about 1/4 cup per bottle).
5. Pour the mixture into four separate bottles or jars.
6. Cut each vanilla bean in half lengthwise and drop half a bean into each bottle.
7. Seal the bottles tightly with lids.
8. Allow the mixture to age for at least two weeks before serving.
Note: If regular coffee keeps you awake at night, substitute decaffeinated coffee instead of Folgers instant coffee crystals.
